request_body.title: Machine Learning Engineer
request_body.jd_text: Looking for a senior machine learning engineer with 5+ years, Python, MLOps, and Kubernetes. Bachelor degree required.

response_json.message: Clarification is required before search can run.

clarification_questions.prompt: List the mandatory technical skills (comma separated, 3 to 7 items).
clarification_questions.tradeoff_note: This separates specialist profiles from broad generalists.
